heading: Omitted
label: 488 to 488f Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 488 to 488f, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 488, , , authorized Territory of Alaska to borrow for public improvements and to issue bonds of Territory for such borrowing.act May 10, 1956, ch. 248, § 170 Stat. 149Section 488a, , , placed limitations on Territory in contracting debts.act May 10, 1956, ch. 248, § 270 Stat. 149Section 488b, , , made provisions for type of land to be issued, scheduling of maturity of bonds, payment of bonds, redemption of bond, and refunding.act May 10, 1956, ch. 248, § 370 Stat. 150Section 488c, , , authorized the Territory to borrow on the credit of the Territory and to issue certificates of indebtedness.act May 10, 1956, ch. 248, § 470 Stat. 150Section 488d, , , provided for issuance of bonds and certificates as negotiable instruments.act May 10, 1956, ch. 248, § 570 Stat. 150Section 488e, , , authorized payment of interest on principal of bonds and certificates of indebtedness as they fall due.act May 10, 1956, ch. 248, § 670 Stat. 150Section 488f, , , authorized guarantee of payment on municipality and school and public utility district bonds.act May 10, 1956, ch. 248, § 770 Stat. 150
